name: detectors: no-any.sh exits 0 when `: any` has accompanying `// allow-any: <reason>` comment per g-ts-001 options
command: mkdir -p src && printf "// allow-any: legacy API\nconst x: any = 1;\n" > src/a.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.ts" && echo ok 1>&2
